assignments.name: research_query
assignments.value: =Research for a {{ $('get_genre_config').first().json.genre_name || $('get_genre_config').first().json[0]?.genre_name }} short story about: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.premise }}. Provide factual details about: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.research_topics || $('workflow_trigger').item.json.premise }}. Include scientific accuracy, historical details, cultural context, and sensory details useful for fiction writing.

message.content: =You are a research assistant. Provide detailed, factual information with citations useful for fiction writing.

parameters.subject: =Short Story Draft: {{ $('set_full_story').first().json.title }}
parameters.message:
={{ ($('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '
Command: ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt + '
' : '') + $('set_full_story').first().json.story_text.replace(/\n/g, '
') }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =Short story written, saved, emailed, and cover art generated: {{ $('set_full_story').first().json.title }}
